priority_directive.critical_flag_directive: Flag any CRITICAL sentiment shift related to PIR-06 (PN-removal-of-Bersatu).
priority_directive.shift_threshold: Flag any entity with sharp sentiment shift (>30% change from previous cycle).

priority_tagged_entities_rev6_delta.note: Some entities carry multiple PIR tags. The rev6 delta is weighted toward PIR-06 consolidation (KINIGUIDE master-narrative + Muhyiddin reinforcement + graft-trial surfacing) and PIR-07 management/expansion (Wee + Anwar + BN confidence + BN-PN Melaka/PRU16). One new PIR-09 legal datum (Tamim Dahri). 7 of 7 new entities are PIR-priority-tagged.

trends.overall_rev6: PH-FAVORABLE TILT HOLDS AND CONSOLIDATES; PIR-06 CRITICAL FLAG CARRIED (consolidation, not new escalation). The dominant development of the rev6 cycle is the ANALYTICAL CONSOLIDATION of the rev5 PIR-06 two-sided/three-sided principal-level motion into the mainstream campaign master-narrative (Malaysiakini KINIGUIDE 'Shifting alliances as battle royale for Negeri Sembilan begins' — Top Story) + Muhyiddin's reinforcing statements ('sole true opposition' + explicit 'new bloc after NS polls') + the BN-PN understanding scope-expansion to Melaka/PRU16 + a corroborating Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing. The PIR-09 axis adds a NEW candidate-credibility/legal datum (Tamim Dahri surrenders to police, intends to campaign for an independent). The PIR-07 axis adds MCA-leadership (Wee 'not a merger') and PM (Anwar manages DAP tension) management of the intra-unity tension downward + a BN self-confidence signal. The 205755 cycle (3rd consecutive overnight pass) returns 0 new content and formal_removal_notice_detected=false — three independent overnight passes now each returning 0 new PIR-relevant content confirms overnight cycles are low-yield and the assessment is stable. NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued. No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold (largest: Muhyiddin +1.25%). No direction flips. NO NEW critical qualitative shift — the PIR-06 CRITICAL flag carries forward from rev5 (rev4→rev5 was the escalation; rev5→rev6 is consolidation).
trends.pir06_trend: CONSOLIDATED at the escalated tier (no new escalation). Progression: 15:09 'could face termination' → 16:33 'info chief floats termination' → 19:19 'has grounds to remove' (Kiandee, NST) → 22:20 SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (Kiandee full Utusan body, 'asas kukuh') [rev4] → 01:08 MYT 19 Jul PRINCIPAL-LEVEL EXIT SIGNALING (Muhyiddin 'Goodbye PN?'; Annuar Musa 'part ways'; PAS 'rift widens'; Hadi 'blames Bersatu'; mainstream 'imminent?') [rev5] → 05:04 MYT 19 Jul CONSOLIDATION (KINIGUIDE 'shifting alliances' master-narrative; Muhyiddin 'sole true opposition' + 'new bloc after NS polls'; BN-PN scope-expansion Melaka/PRU16; Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing) [rev6]. THREE-SIDED fracture unchanged. NO formal notice of either type across three consecutive overnight passes. Trajectory UNCHANGED: most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; PN-MT removal remains possible. Trigger #2 unchanged (reachable via EITHER path, not fired).
trends.pir09_trend: NEW candidate-credibility/legal datum: activist Tamim Dahri surrenders to police (Port Dickson, FB-threat case) and intends to campaign for an NS independent candidate (candidate unnamed — possible N.33 linkage pending vetting). Joins THREE carryover disciplinary/credibility events (Gerakan pecat Tang Jay Son; MCA silencing Saw Yee Fung; Albert Tei 'barking dogs') + carryover Bujang Abu withdrawal (reconfirmed Utusan). NEW management context: Wee (MCA president) 'BN-PN not a merger' (leadership manages the Saw Yee Fung tension downward); 'Pemimpin MCA persoal dakwaan kerjasama UMNO-Pas' (rank-and-file questioning persists). Disciplinary pattern bridges to PIR-06.
trends.pir07_trend: Day-1 campaign active across 8 watch seats (carryover). NEW rev6 context: (1) BN-PN understanding scope-expansion to Melaka/PRU16 ('penentu di Melaka, PRU16') — multi-cycle coalition-shaping mechanism, structural backdrop to PIR-06; (2) Wee (MCA president) 'BN-PN not a merger' + Anwar 'DAP postpone decision' — intra-unity tension managed downward (live but cooled); (3) BN self-confidence 'yakin menang majoriti mudah, bentuk kerjaan tanpa parti lain'; (4) PH Ampangan campaign-effectiveness framing (Utusan 'Kempen berkesan mampu bantu PH pertahankan Ampangan'). No new Day-1 campaign events or poll/forecast publications in the deep-overnight window (205755 = 3rd overnight pass, 0 new content). 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); 2 five-cornered (N.10, N.33) — trigger #7 WATCH (Tamim independent-campaign intent is a new PIR-09/07 overlap). BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi). Next meaningful campaign update expected daytime MYT 19 Jul (Day-2).
trends.negative_sentiment_trend: Opposition-cohesion negatives HOLD at the rev5 escalated tier (consolidation, not deepening): ESC-014 0.82 (UNCHANGED), ESC-011 0.80 (UNCHANGED), Bersatu 0.74 (UNCHANGED), Muhyiddin 0.80→0.81 (+1.25%, reinforced), Annuar Musa 0.72→0.70 (−2.8%, confidence-reduction per speaker-label caveat), PAS/Hadi 0.70 (UNCHANGED). NEW PIR-06 corroborating negative: Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing 0.58. NEW PIR-09 negative: Tamim Dahri 0.50 (legal + independent-campaign). All maximally favourable to PH.
trends.positive_sentiment_trend: No new positive entities in the rev6 delta (deep-overnight consolidation window produced no new PH-favorable campaign content). PH-favorable positives are carryover: Aminuddin 0.61 (reinforced by Utusan 'Kempen berkesan mampu bantu PH pertahankan Ampangan'), Azizul 0.53 (civil 'friendship match'), Jalaluddin 0.55 (BN momentum/manifesto), SPR-confirmed configuration 0.62. PH-favorable structural tilt HOLDS via the consolidated opposition fracture (PIR-06 two-sided motion now the master narrative).
trends.neutral_sentiment_trend: NEW neutrals: KINIGUIDE 'shifting alliances' 0.55 (PIR-06 master-narrative); Wee 'BN-PN not a merger' 0.48 (PIR-07 MCA management); Anwar 'DAP postpone' 0.50 (PIR-07 PM management); BN 'majoriti mudah' 0.52 (PIR-07 BN self-confidence); BN-PN extends Melaka/PRU16 0.52 (PIR-07 scope expansion). Carryover neutrals: mainstream 'imminent?' framing 0.55, BN-PN understanding operational 0.55, DAP anti-BN tension 0.50, Samsuri post-election continuation 0.52, N.14 Ampangan 0.50, Nazri 0.48, MB-candidate deferred 0.50, Fuziah 0.52, Bujang Abu 0.45.
trends.numeric_shift_threshold: No entity exceeds 30% numeric shift in the rev5→rev6 delta (largest: Muhyiddin +1.25%; Annuar Musa −2.8% confidence adjustment). PIR-06.critical_flag_status: ACTIVE / CARRIED from rev5. The rev5→rev6 transition is CONSOLIDATION, not a new critical shift. The two-sided/three-sided principal-level motion holds at the rev5 escalated tier without crossing into formal notice.
PIR-06.assessment: CONSOLIDATED at the rev5 escalated tier. The 194028 cycle adds ANALYTICAL CONSOLIDATION (KINIGUIDE 'Shifting alliances' Top Story — the PIR-06 thread is now the campaign's master narrative) + Muhyiddin's reinforcing statements ('sole true opposition' + explicit 'new bloc after NS polls') + BN-PN understanding scope-expansion to Melaka/PRU16 (the structural mechanism excluding Bersatu) + a corroborating Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing. The 205755 cycle (3rd consecutive overnight pass) returns 0 new PIR-06 content and formal_removal_notice_detected=false. NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued. Bersatu contests 24 seats under its own flag (SPR-confirmed). 8 Tier-4 seats mapped: 4 vs PAS (Serting, Ampangan, Paroi, Bagan Pinang) + 4 vs Wawasan (Klawang, Sikamat, Mambau, Gemas); NO Bersatu candidate withdrawals detected. Trajectory UNCHANGED — Bersatu voluntary realignment/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll most likely; reactive PN-MT removal remains possible. Maximally favourable to PH.

verdict: CAMPAIGN DAY 1 DEEP-OVERNIGHT CONSOLIDATION (05:04 MYT 19 Jul) — PIR-06 CRITICAL FLAG CARRIED FORWARD (consolidation, not new escalation). The rev5 two-sided/three-sided principal-level coalition-restructuring motion is now CONSOLIDATED as the mainstream campaign master-narrative (Malaysiakini KINIGUIDE 'Shifting alliances' Top Story) + Muhyiddin 'sole true opposition' + explicit 'new bloc after NS polls' + BN-PN scope-expansion to Melaka/PRU16 + Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing. The motion remains THREE-SIDED (PN-MT-may-remove / Bersatu-may-exit / PAS-sidelining). NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued — confirmed across THREE consecutive overnight passes (182751, 194028, 205755), each formal_removal_notice_detected=false. CAVEAT: Annuar Musa 'part-ways' speaker-label ambiguous (known Bersatu Sec-Gen is Hamzah Zainudin) — retained with reduced confidence (0.72→0.70); does not change the two-sided assessment (Muhyiddin independently corroborated). PIR-09 adds NEW Tamim Dahri surrender-to-police + independent-campaign legal datum. PIR-07 adds Wee 'BN-PN not a merger' + Anwar 'DAP postpone' tension management + BN 'majoriti mudah' self-confidence + BN-PN Melaka/PRU16 scope expansion. entities_190215.json RESOLVES the rev5 entity-extraction gap. No entity exceeds 30% numeric shift (largest: Muhyiddin +1.25%); no direction flips; NO NEW critical shift (escalation was rev4→rev5; rev5→rev6 is consolidation). Trigger #2 UNCHANGED (reachable via EITHER path, not fired). No Bersatu candidate withdrawals in 8 Tier-4 seats. PH-favorable tilt holds and consolidates. Next meaningful run after daytime MYT 19 Jul Day-2 collection. TLP:AMBER.
